film.title: Hate Story 3
film.overview: Siya appears to be the bone of contention between warring businessmen Aditya and Saurav. But this one runs deeper than your average love triangle.

dialogues.dialogue: But even in my dreams when I try to touch you. I wake up. Aren't you ashamed of talking dirty like this? Don't your mom and your sister teach you anything? My reputation isn't tarnished, thank the Lord
Arouse my body in slumber. This winter feels so hot. There's no shame anywhere. Sweetheart, we've made a legitimate mistake. This winter feels so hot.
Sweetheart, we've made a legitimate mistake. This winter feels so hot. There's no shame anywhere. Sweetheart, we've made a legitimate mistake. Let me make things hot for you.
Never underestimate your enemy. And this dialogue's repeated in every movie. Really. Shame on you. I could've released this recording to the media. Or handed it over to the police.
